error_signature: RespondToWebhook returns Airtable response instead of AI output
title: Incorrect response returned from RespondToWebhook node
symptom: The RespondToWebhook node returns the Airtable response instead of the expected AI output, causing confusion for the user.
root_cause: The mapping of outputs in the RespondToWebhook node may not be set correctly, leading to the wrong data being sent back to the user. This often happens when the node is configured to return the last output instead of the intended AI response.
fix_steps: Check the output mapping to ensure the AI response is selected
Test the workflow to confirm the correct response is returned
agent_instruction: Ensure the RespondToWebhook node is correctly mapped to return the AI output instead of the Airtable response.
